assertionResults.title: Pasted nsec is used as the root of the new keyset (not replaced)

steps.action: Navigate to /create, paste a checksum-valid nsec, and submit Create Keyset.
steps.expected: Create flow should proceed using pasted nsec path.
steps.observed: Flow proceeded to /create/progress then /create/profile with keyset session present.

steps.action: Capture create-session + WASM verification via in-page eval (recompute from pasted nsec and recover from threshold shares).
steps.expected: group_pk should match create_keyset_bundle_from_nsec path and recovered nsec should equal pasted nsec.

evidence.network: No API dependency for this assertion (local UI + WASM path).

assertionResults.title: Invalid nsec shows inline error, does not proceed

steps.action: Enter invalid non-nsec value ('invalid-key') and click Create Keyset.
steps.expected: Inline error and no navigation to progress screen.
steps.observed: Inline error 'Invalid nsec format — must start with nsec1.' shown; URL remained /create.

evidence.network: No relevant outbound API call observed.

assertionResults.title: Nsec field is masked by default; reveal toggle flips masked ↔ revealed

steps.action: Load /create and inspect nsec input + reveal control before entry.
steps.expected: Input type=password and reveal button disabled when field empty.

steps.action: Paste valid nsec, toggle reveal, then toggle back.
steps.expected: type should switch password→text→password and aria-label should alternate Reveal/Hide.
steps.observed: type switched to text (Hide nsec), then back to password (Reveal nsec).
Returned input type=password with empty field and disabled reveal.

assertionResults.title: Nsec is never persisted to any browser storage

steps.observed: needleHits false for trimmed and whitespace variants.

steps.action: Capture storage immediately after paste and after keyset generation.
steps.observed: needleHits remained false in both snapshots.

steps.action: Unlock and navigate to dashboard, then capture storage again.
steps.observed: needleHits remained false; profile persisted only as encrypted bfprofile payload.

evidence.network: Dashboard session opened relay sockets to wss://relay.damus.io and wss://relay.primal.net; no leak of test nsec in captured storage/network metadata.

assertionResults.title: Pasted nsec whitespace is trimmed without losing material

steps.action: Paste whitespace-wrapped nsec into /create input and inspect field value before submit.
steps.expected: Input value reflects trimmed nsec string.

steps.action: Submit Create Keyset with whitespace-wrapped nsec.
Scan persisted storage for both trimmed and untrimmed variants.
steps.expected: No persisted hit for either variant.
steps.observed: No persisted hit for either variant.

assertionResults.issues: Contract clause 'input value reflects trimmed string' did not hold; trimming occurs for validation/submit path but the field value remained whitespace-wrapped before submit.

assertionResults.title: Nsec is scrubbed from DOM on navigation / lock

steps.action: Submit create flow with pasted nsec and navigate away from /create.
steps.expected: Nsec should not remain present in DOM/input values after navigation.
steps.observed: DOM scan at /create/profile showed 0 text/value hits for the pasted nsec.

steps.action: Reverse-navigate back to /create and inspect input + full DOM.
steps.expected: Input should be empty/masked and no residual nsec text in document.
steps.observed: nsec input empty with type=password; full DOM scan returned 0 hits.

frictions.description: The /create/progress screen auto-advances quickly to /create/profile, requiring immediate evidence capture for intermediate-state assertions.
frictions.resolution: Captured progress evidence immediately after wait-for-url and used persisted JSON artifacts for call-trace/storage proof.

frictions.description: The reveal-toggle button accessible name flips between 'Reveal nsec' and 'Hide nsec', invalidating stale element refs mid-step.
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted the page after each toggle before continuing interactions.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed (VAL-BACKUP-028 due to input value not being trimmed in-field before submit).
